---
title: "Makeup works by modifying factors of facial beauty"
authors: "Batres, C., Jones, A. L., Barlett, C. P., Porcheron, A., Morizot, F., & Russell, R."
year: 2022
date: 2022-01-01
pub-journal: "Psychology of Aesthetics, Creativity, and the Arts"
doi: "10.1037/aca0000505"
pdf: "assets/papers/2022/batresetal2022.pdf"
categories: [cosmetics, attractiveness]
---
